title: LeoTweaks Unique Potions
description: Distinctive textures for all Potions, all in Vanilla Minecraft! Also includes Visual Tipped Arrows and Ominous Bottles. No Mods required.
body:
### This Resourcepack gives all Potions their own distinction.

---
Once you're familiar with the pack, you'll be able to tell what Amplifier something has at just a glance!

Potion Categories:
- [_Duration Amplified_] **Redstone**    💖 Red
- [_Strength Amplified_] **Glowstone**      💛 Yellow

![Shows all Splash Potions](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9fe7fffead4eb0062b7edb1914827e62e07e451f.png)


Ominous Bottle Categories:
- Level **I**   💚 Green
- Level **II**  💛 Yellow
- Level **III** 🧡 Orange
- Level **IV**  💖 Red
- Level **V**   ❤️ Dark Red
